expression.expression: ((((in0.OD = in1.OD) AND (in0.DPTR_DATE = in1.DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.LEG_CABIN_CD = in1.CABIN_CODE))
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.OD = in1.OD) AND (in0.DPTR_DATE = in1.DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.LEG_CABIN_CD = in1.CABIN_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.CABIN_CODE END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.OD = in1.OD) AND (in0.DPTR_DATE = in1.DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.LEG_CABIN_CD = in1.CABIN_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.FLT_NBR END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.OD = in1.OD) AND (in0.DPTR_DATE = in1.DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.LEG_CABIN_CD = in1.CABIN_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.OD END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.OD = in1.OD) AND (in0.DPTR_DATE = in1.DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.LEG_CABIN_CD = in1.CABIN_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.DPTR_DATE END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.OD = in1.OD) AND (in0.DPTR_DATE = in1.DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.LEG_CABIN_CD = in1.CABIN_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.NDOD END)
(CASE WHEN (INTAKE_SHARE IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE INTAKE_SHARE END)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT
MD.OD, MD.ORIG, MD.ORIG_CITY_NAME, MD.ORIG_AIRPORT_NAME, MD.ORIG_STATE, MD.DEST, MD.DEST_CITY_NAME, MD.DEST_AIRPORT_NAME, MD.DEST_STATE

FROM
ABK_dW.MARKET_DIM MD


ORDER BY 1

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((ORIG_CITY_NAME = 'Washington') AND (ORIG_STATE = 'DC')) THEN 'Washington DC' ELSE ORIG_CITY_NAME END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((DEST_CITY_NAME = 'Washington') AND (DEST_STATE = 'DC')) THEN 'Washington DC' ELSE DEST_CITY_NAME END) AS string)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT
MD.OD
, MD.NDOD
, FND.FLT_NBR
, DDD.DPTR_DATE
, DDD.DPTR_WEEK_START_DATE
, DDD.DPTR_DAY_OF_WEEK
, MD.MILES
, MD.PLNG_REG_SHORT_NAME
, LF.LEG_CABIN_CD
, NVL(SUM(LF.LEG_CAB_RPM_CNT ),0) RPMS
, NVL(SUM(LF.LEG_CAB_ASM_CNT ),0) ASMS
, nvl(sum(LF.LEG_CAB_BKG_CNT), 0) BKGS
, nvl(sum(LF.LEG_CAB_CAP_CNT), 0) CAP
, nvl(sum(LF.CLS_AVAIL_MAX_CNT), 0) AVAIL

FROM
ABK_DW.INV_FLT_LEG_CAB_MILES_FACT LF
JOIN ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM SDD ON LF.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.FLIGHT_NBR_DIM FND ON LF.MKTG_FLT_NBR_KEY = FND.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.DPTR_DATE_DIM DDD ON LF.LEG_DPTR_DATE_KEY = DDD.DPTR_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON LF.LEG_MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY

WHERE SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE-1 AND SYSDATE
and FND.SVC_TYPE IN ('LEASE', 'SCHEDULED')
AND FND.FLT_TYPE = 'P'
AND (FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)
--AND MD.OD = 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY 
MD.OD
, MD.NDOD
, FND.FLT_NBR
, DDD.DPTR_DATE
, DDD.DPTR_WEEK_START_DATE
, DDD.DPTR_DAY_OF_WEEK
, MD.MILES
, MD.PLNG_REG_SHORT_NAME
, LF.LEG_CABIN_CD

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (in0.OD = in1.OD) THEN in1.FLT_CNT ELSE NULL END)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT

MD.NDOD 
, SUM(CASE WHEN MCD.MKTG_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE = 'AS' THEN QF.QSI_CNT END) AS_QSI_PTS
, SUM(QF.QSI_CNT) TTL_QSI_PTS

FROM
QSI_DW.QUALITY_OF_SERVICE_FACT QF
JOIN QSI_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON QF.MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY
JOIN QSI_DW.SERVICE_MONTH_DIM SMD ON QF.SERVICE_MONTH_KEY = SMD.SERVICE_MONTH_KEY
JOIN QSI_DW.MKTG_CARRIER_DIM MCD ON QF.MKTG_CARRIER_KEY = MCD.MKTG_CARRIER_KEY


WHERE
MD.YIELD_USER_ID != 'UNUSED'
AND SMD.SERVICE_MTH_START_DATE BETWEEN LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1)) AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 2))
--AND MD.NDOD = 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY  MD.NDOD

condition.expression: (((NOT (LEG_NDOD = TT_NDOD)) OR (LEG_NDOD IS NULL)) OR (TT_NDOD IS NULL))

warehouseQuery.query:
select
md.NDOD
, sum(lc.LEG_CAB_ASM_CNT) / sys.TTL_ASM PCT_SYS_ASMS

from ABK_DW.INV_FLT_LEG_CAB_MILES_FACT lc
join ABK_DW.MKTG_FLT_NBR_DIM fnd on fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR_KEY = lc.MKTG_FLT_NBR_KEY
join ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM md on lc.LEG_MARKET_KEY = md.MARKET_KEY
join ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM sdd on lc.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = sdd.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
join
(
select
sum(lc.LEG_CAB_ASM_CNT) TTL_ASM
from ABK_DW.INV_FLT_LEG_CAB_MILES_FACT lc
join ABK_DW.MKTG_FLT_NBR_DIM fnd on fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR_KEY = lc.MKTG_FLT_NBR_KEY
join ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM sdd on lc.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = sdd.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY


where 
SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE-1 AND SYSDATE
and fnd.SVC_TYPE_DESC IN ('LEASE', 'SCHEDULED')
AND fnd.FLT_TYPE_CD = 'P'
AND ( fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR  fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR  fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)
) sys on 1=1

where SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE-1 AND SYSDATE
and fnd.SVC_TYPE_DESC IN ('LEASE', 'SCHEDULED')
AND fnd.FLT_TYPE_CD = 'P'
AND ( fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR  fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR  fnd.MKTG_FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)
--AND MD.NDOD = 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY MD.NDOD, SYS.TTL_ASM

expression.expression: COUNT((CASE WHEN ((OD IS NULL) OR (OD = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT
MD.OD
, round(count(1)) flt_cnt_next_3_mth
, round(count(1) / 3,0) flt_cnt

FROM
ABK_DW.SCHEDULE_FACT BAAF
JOIN ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON BAAF.MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM SDD ON BAAF.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.DPTR_DATE_DIM DDD ON BAAF.DPTR_DATE_KEY = DDD.DPTR_DATE_KEY
join ABK_DW.FLIGHT_NBR_DIM fnd on BAAF.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = fnd.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY


WHERE
DDD.DPTR_DATE between last_day(sysdate) and add_months(last_day(sysdate),3)
and SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE between sysdate-1 and sysdate
and FND.SVC_TYPE IN ('LEASE', 'SCHEDULED')
AND FND.FLT_TYPE = 'P'
AND (FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)
--AND MD.OD = 'GSTJNU'

group by MD.OD

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN (NEW_MARKET = 'YES') THEN 'HIGH   ' WHEN (((RANK <= 25) AND (PCT_SYS_ASMS > 0.005)) AND (AS_QSI < 0.85)) THEN 'EXTREME' WHEN ((RANK <= 86) AND (AS_QSI < 0.85)) THEN 'HIGH   ' WHEN (((RANK > 86) AND (RANK <= 147)) AND (AS_QSI < 0.85)) THEN 'MEDIUM ' ELSE 'LOW    ' END) AS string)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT
 MD.OD
, DDD.DPTR_MTH_YEAR_NAME
, COUNT(FLI.FLT_NBR) FLT_CNT_NEXT_MTH

FROM 
ABK_DW.INV_FLT_LEG_CAB_MILES_FACT LF
JOIN ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON LF.LEG_MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM SDD ON LF.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.DPTR_DATE_DIM DDD ON LF.LEG_DPTR_DATE_KEY = DDD.DPTR_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.FLIGHT_NBR_DIM FLI ON LF.MKTG_FLT_NBR_KEY = FLI.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY

WHERE 
SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE between sysdate-1 and sysdate
AND DDD.DPTR_DATE BETWEEN last_day(add_months(sysdate,0))+1 AND last_day(add_months(sysdate,1))
AND (FLI.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR FLI.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR FLI.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)
--AND MD.OD = 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY 
 MD.OD
 , DDD.DPTR_MTH_YEAR_NAME

SELECT
A.NDOD
, count(1) CARRIER_CNT
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'AS' then 1 else 0 end) AS_IND
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'DL' then 1 else 0 end) DL_IND
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'UA' then 1 else 0 end) UA_IND
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'AA' then 1 else 0 end) AA_IND
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'B6' then 1 else 0 end) B6_IND
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'WN' then 1 else 0 end) WN_IND
, sum(case when A.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE = 'HA' then 1 else 0 end) HA_IND

FROM
    (
    select
    md.NDOD
    , mcd.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE
    , sum(isf.ECONOMY_CLASS_ASM_CNT) ASMS

    from
    ABK_DW.INDUSTRY_SCHEDULE_FACT isf
    join ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM md on isf.MARKET_KEY = md.MARKET_KEY
    join ABK_DW.MKTG_CARRIER_DIM mcd on isf.MKTG_CARRIER_KEY = mcd.MKTG_CARRIER_KEY

    where
    isf.SNAPSHOT_DATE between sysdate-1 and sysdate
    and md.YIELD_USER_ID != 'UNUSED'
--AND MD.NDOD = 'GSTJNU'

    group by  md.NDOD, mcd.MKTG_CARRIER_AIRLINE_CODE
    ) A
GROUP BY A.NDOD

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((((VARIABLETYPE = 'DIRECT') AND (NEW_MARKET = 'YES')) AND (FLT_CNT_NEXT_3_MTH IS NULL)) OR (((VARIABLETYPE = 'DIRECT') AND (NEW_MARKET IS NULL)) AND (FLT_CNT_NEXT_MTH IS NULL))) THEN 'OFF' ELSE NULL END) AS string)

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT 
  MD.OD
, DD.DPTR_DATE
, SUM(LP.BID_PRICE) TOTAL_BP

FROM ABK_DW.RMS_LEG_CABIN_BP LP
JOIN ABK_DW.RMS_DATED_FLIGHT_FACT DFF ON LP.DATED_FLIGHT_KEY = DFF.DATED_FLIGHT_KEY AND LP.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = DFF.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.DPTR_DATE_DIM DD ON DFF.DPTR_DATE_KEY = DD.DPTR_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.RMS_LEG_CABIN L ON LP.LEG_CABIN_KEY = L.LEG_CABIN_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON L.MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.FLIGHT_NBR_DIM F ON DFF.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = F.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM SDD ON LP.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY

WHERE SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

--AND DD.DPTR_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE+180)
AND (LP.SEAT_INDEX BETWEEN (L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR - ROUND((L.ACH_DMD - L.CAB_BKG_CNT),0)) AND (L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR) or LP.SEAT_INDEX > L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR)
--AND MD.OD = 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY
  MD.OD
, DD.DPTR_DATE

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN (NO_FLIGHT_OVERRIDER IS NOT NULL) THEN NO_FLIGHT_OVERRIDER ELSE SUPPORT END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN (in0.NDOD = in1.NDOD) THEN in1.NDOD ELSE NULL END)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((DPTR_DATE IS NULL) OR (CAST(DPTR_DATE AS string) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

warehouseQuery.query:
select
LMD.LEG_NDOD
, TTMD.TT_NDOD
, TDD.LEG_TK_DPTR_WEEK_START_DATE +364 DPTR_WEEK
, SUM(REV.LEG_PAX_CNT)

from        
REVENUE_DW.PAX_LEG_FUTURE_REVENUE_FACT REV
JOIN REVENUE_DW.LEG_MARKET_DIM LMD ON REV.LEG_MARKET_KEY = LMD.LEG_MARKET_KEY
JOIN REVENUE_DW.TRUE_TRIP_MARKET_DIM TTMD ON REV.TRUE_TRIP_MARKET_KEY = TTMD.TRUE_TRIP_MARKET_KEY
JOIN REVENUE_DW.TKT_ISSUE_DATE_DIM TID ON REV.TKT_ISSUE_DATE_KEY = TID.TKT_ISSUE_DATE_KEY
JOIN REVENUE_DW.LEG_TKTD_DPTR_DATE_DIM TDD ON REV.LEG_TKTD_DPTR_DATE_KEY = TDD.LEG_TKTD_DPTR_DATE_KEY

where
TDD.LEG_TK_DPTR_WEEK_START_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE-380 AND SYSDATE-15
AND TID.TKT_ISSUE_WEEK_START_DATE BETWEEN ADD_MONTHS(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE),-12) AND ADD_MONTHS(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE),-11)
--AND LMD.LEG_NDOD= 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY LMD.LEG_NDOD, TTMD.TT_NDOD, TDD.LEG_TK_DPTR_WEEK_START_DATE +364

WITH CR AS (SELECT 
  MD.OD
, DD.DPTR_DATE
, C.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE
, SUM(SCC.ACHIEVABLE_DMD * SCC.YIELD_AMT) CLASS_REVENUE

FROM ABK_DW.RMS_SEG_CABIN_CLASS SCC
JOIN ABK_DW.RMS_SEG_CABIN SC ON SCC.SEG_CABIN_KEY = SC.SEG_CABIN_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.RMS_DATED_FLIGHT_FACT DFF ON SCC.DATED_FLIGHT_KEY = DFF.DATED_FLIGHT_KEY AND SCC.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = DFF.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.DPTR_DATE_DIM DD ON DFF.DPTR_DATE_KEY = DD.DPTR_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON SC.MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_DIM C ON SCC.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_KEY = C.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM SDD ON SCC.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.FLIGHT_NBR_DIM F ON DFF.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = F.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY

WHERE SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
--AND DD.DPTR_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE+180)
--AND MD.OD = 'GSTJNU'
AND F.FLT_TYPE = 'P'
AND (F.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR F.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR F.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)

GROUP BY
  MD.OD
, DD.DPTR_DATE
, C.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)

SELECT 
  CR.OD
, CR.DPTR_DATE
, SUM(CR.CLASS_REVENUE) REVENUE

FROM CR

GROUP BY
  CR.OD
, CR.DPTR_DATE

SELECT 
MD.OD
, MD.NDOD
, DDD.DPTR_DATE
, FND.FLT_NBR
, L.CABIN_CODE
, L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR
, DFF.CAP
, L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR - COUNT(LP.BID_PRICE) AS NBR_ZERO_BP

FROM ABK_DW.RMS_LEG_CABIN_BP LP
JOIN ABK_DW.RMS_LEG_CABIN L ON LP.LEG_CABIN_KEY = L.LEG_CABIN_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.SNAPSHOT_DATE_DIM SDD ON L.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.MARKET_DIM MD ON L.MARKET_KEY = MD.MARKET_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.DPTR_DATE_DIM DDD ON L.DPTR_DATE_KEY = DDD.DPTR_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.RMS_DATED_FLIGHT_FACT DFF ON L.DATED_FLIGHT_KEY = DFF.DATED_FLIGHT_KEY AND L.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY = DFF.SNAPSHOT_DATE_KEY
JOIN ABK_DW.FLIGHT_NBR_DIM FND ON DFF.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = FND.FLIGHT_NBR_KEY

WHERE SDD.SNAPSHOT_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
AND LP.SEAT_INDEX <= L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR
--AND DDD.DPTR_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE+180)
AND (FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 1 AND 1499 OR FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2959 OR FND.FLT_NBR BETWEEN 3300 AND 3499)
--AND MD.OD = 'GSTJNU'

GROUP BY
MD.OD
,  MD.NDOD
, DDD.DPTR_DATE
, FND.FLT_NBR
, L.CABIN_CODE
, L.SEAT_INDEX_CURR
, DFF.CAP

condition.expression: ((NOT ((VARIABLETYPE = 'DIRECT') AND (MILES IS NULL))) OR (((VARIABLETYPE = 'DIRECT') AND (MILES IS NULL)) IS NULL))

expression.expression: COUNT((CASE WHEN ((DPTR_DATE IS NULL) OR (CAST(DPTR_DATE AS string) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))
(CASE WHEN (NBR_ZERO_BP IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE NBR_ZERO_BP END)
CAST((CAST((SUBSTRING( OD, (((LENGTH(OD)) - 3) + 1), 3)) AS DECIMAL(19, 9)) + CAST((SUBSTRING( OD, 1, 3)) AS DECIMAL(19, 9))) AS string)
